title: Instantly Mine Deepslate
description: One‑click deepslate mining with an Efficiency V Netherite pickaxe under Haste II
body:
# IMD (Instantly Mine Deepslate)

IMD is a lightweight, no‑nonsense datapack that supercharges your deepslate mining experience. Whenever you’re holding a Netherite pickaxe enchanted with Efficiency V and under the effect of Haste II, IMD automatically bumps your mining_efficiency attribute to 30, letting you break deepslate in a single tick. Remove either Haste II or the enchanted tool, and your efficiency resets to its default, ensuring balanced gameplay.


## Key Features

- Instant Deepslate Mining: One‑click deepslate breaks when conditions are met
- Automatic Attribute Management: Applies and removes mining_efficiency seamlessly each tick


## Compatibility
- Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.5
- Works in both single‑player and multiplayer


## Installation
1. Download the IMD ZIP and place it in <your world>/datapacks/.
2. Launch or reload your world with /reload.
3. Hold a Netherite pickaxe with Efficiency V and gain Haste II to mine deepslate instantly!
